     C*****************************************************************
     C*Schadenstext bearbeiten
     C*****************************************************************

       DoW not *In12;
           *IN04 = *Off;
           *IN10 = *Off;
           *IN90 = *On;
           *IN99 = *Off;
           Write HS1212WT;
           ExFmt HS1212CT;
           Select;
              When *In04;
                  loadOrderTextSfl();
              When *In10;
                  loadText('GPS');
              When not *In12;
                 savetext();
                 *IN12 = *On;
           EndSl;
       EndDo;

       EndSr;
     C*****************************************************************
     D*Schadenstext laden
     D*****************************************************************
     P loadText        B
     D loadText        PI
     D   loadType                     3A   value
     D*----------------------------------------------------------------
       // Subfile l�schen
       ZLT = 0;
       *IN90 = *Off;
       *IN99 = *On;
       Write HS1212CT;
       // Subfile f�llen
       *IN90 = *On;
       *IN99 = *Off;
       If loadType = 'GPT';
          loadtextGPT(0);
       EndIf;
       If loadType = 'GPS';
          loadtextGPS(0);
       EndIf;
       If ZLT = 0;
          TEXT = G7312A;
          ZLT += 1;
          Write HS1212ST;
          TEXT = G7313A;
          ZLT += 1;
          Write HS1212ST;
          TEXT = G7332A;
          ZLT += 1;
          Write HS1212ST;
          TEXT = G7333A;
          ZLT += 1;
          Write HS1212ST;
          loadtextGPT(ZLT);
       EndIf;
       exec sql close ct;
       DOW ZLT < 99;
          TEXT = *Blanks;
          ZLT += 1;
          Write HS1212ST;
       EndDo;
       loadTextFromSfl();
     P                 E
     D*****************************************************************
     P loadTextGPT     B
     D loadTextGPT     PI
     D   start                        3  0 value
     D*----------------------------------------------------------------
       ZLT = 0;
       exec sql
          declare ct Cursor for select GPT_TXT
            from HSGPTF
            where GPT_KZL = :G71000 and GPT_CNR = :G71050 and
                  GPT_FNR = :G7306A
            order by GPT_ZNR;
       exec sql open ct;
       exec sql fetch next from ct into :record_t;
       If SQLCOD = 100;
          loadtextGps(start);
          exec sql close ct;
          If ZLT < start;
             ZLT = start;
          EndIf;
          return;
       EndIf;
       DoW SQLCOD = 0;
          TEXT = R_TXT;
          ZLT += 1;
          If ZLT > start;
             write HS1212ST;
          EndIf;
          exec sql fetch next from ct into :record_t;
       EndDo;
       exec sql close ct;
       If ZLT < start;
          ZLT = start;
       EndIf;
     P                 E
     C*****************************************************************
     D*Auftragstext laden HSGPSPF
     D*****************************************************************
     P loadTextGPS     B
     D loadTextGPS     PI
     D   start                        3  0 value
     D*----------------------------------------------------------------
       Chain(N) KEYGPS2 HSGPSPR;
       DOW Not %EoF(HSGPSPF);
           If GPS150 = %Dec(G7306A:2:0) And
              GPS020 = *Blanks And GPS040 = 'TXT';
              If %Subst(GPS080:1:1) <> '+';
                 TEXT = GPS080;
                 ZLT += 1;
                 If ZLT > start;
                    Write HS1212ST;
                 EndIf;
              EndIf;
           EndIf;
           ReadE(N) KEYGPS2 HSGPSPR;
       EndDo;
     P                 E
     C*****************************************************************
     D*Schadenstext von Subfile laden
     D*****************************************************************
     P loadTextFromSfl...
     P                 B
     D loadTextFromSfl...
     D                 PI
     D*----------------------------------------------------------------
       countZ = 0;
       DoW countZ < 4;
          countZ += 1;
          Chain countZ HS1212ST;
          If countZ = 1;
             G7312A = TEXT;
          EndIf;
          If countZ = 2;
             G7313A = TEXT;
          EndIf;
          If countZ = 3;
             G7332A = TEXT;
          EndIf;
          If countZ = 4;
             G7333A = TEXT;
          EndIf;
       EndDo;
     P                 E
     C*****************************************************************
     D*Auftragstext laden
     D*****************************************************************
     P loadOrderTextSfl...
     P                 B
     D loadOrderTextSfl...
     D                 PI
     D*----------------------------------------------------------------
       *IN90 = *Off;
       *IN99 = *On;
       ZLA = 0;
       Write HS1212CA;
       *IN99 = *OFF;
       DATTXT = DATTX5;
       DATTOP = DATTO5;

       Chain(N) KEYGPS2 HSGPSPR;
       DOW Not %EoF(HSGPSPF);
           If GPS020 = *Blanks And GPS040 = 'TXT';
              MARKA = *Blanks;
              DATA  = *Blanks;
              DAT5  = %Char(GPS150);
              DAT6  = GPS080;
              If %Subst(GPS080:1:1) <> '+';
                 ZLA += 1;
                 Write HS1212SA;
               EndIf;
           EndIf;
           ReadE(N) KEYGPS2 HSGPSPR;
       EndDo;

       If ZLA <> 0;
          *In90 = *On;
          *In95 = *On;
          Write HS1212WA;
          ExFmt HS1212CA;
          *In90 = *Off;
          *In95 = *Off;

          If Not *In12;
              countZ = 0;
              ReadC HS1212SA;
              DoW Not %EoF(HS1212D);
                  If MARKA <> *Blanks;
                     countZ += 1;
                     Chain countZ HS1212ST;
                     If Not %EoF(HS1212D);
                        TEXT = DAT6;
                        Update HS1212ST;
                     EndIf;
                  EndIf;
                  ReadC HS1212SA;
              EndDo;
              loadTextFromSfl();
          EndIf;
       EndIf;
       *In12 = *Off;
     P                 E
     C*****************************************************************
     D*Schadenstext speichern
     D*****************************************************************
     P saveText        B
     D saveText        PI
     D*----------------------------------------------------------------
       count = 1;
       countZ = 0;
       txt = *Blanks;
       DoW count < 100;
          Chain count HS1212ST;
          If text = *Blanks;
             exec sql
                  delete from hsgptf
                         where GPT_KZL = :G71000 and GPT_CNR = :G71050 and
                               GPT_FNR = :G7306A AND GPT_ZNR = :count;
          Else;
             If countZ < 4;
                countZ +=1;
                txt(countZ) = TEXT;
             EndIf;
             exec sql
                  update hsgptf set gpt_txt = :TEXT
                         where GPT_KZL = :G71000 and GPT_CNR = :G71050 and
                               GPT_FNR = :G7306A AND GPT_ZNR = :count;
             If SQLCOD <> 0;
                exec sql
                     INSERT INTO HSGPTF
                            (GPT_KZL, GPT_CNR, GPT_FNR, GPT_WNR, GPT_ZNR,
                             GPT_TXT)
                            VALUES(:G71000, :G71050, :G7306A, :G73065, :count,
                                   :text);
             EndIf;
          EndIf;
          count += 1;
       EndDo;
       G7312A = txt(1);
       G7313A = txt(2);
       G7332A = txt(3);
       G7333A = txt(4);
       exec sql
            update hsg73pf set G73120 = :G7312A, G73130 = :G7313A,
                               G73320 = :G7332A, G73330 = :G7333A
                   where G73000 = :G71000 and G73050 = :G71050 and
                         G73060 = :G7306A AND G73065 = :G73065;

             If A_EPS <> *Blanks;

                   Select;
                   When EpsType = '1';

                   When EpsType = '2';

                   When EpsType = '3';
                      G7318A = 0;
                      G7319A = getEpsComp(A_EPS:G71060);
                      G7320A = G7319A;
                   When D_Eps = *Blanks;
                      SetLl
                      (PKZ:G71010:G71020:STORNO:G71030:G_BEREICH:G_WETE:'Q4')
                      HSAHTPF;
                      ReadE
                      (PKZ:G71010:G71020:STORNO:G71030:G_BEREICH:G_WETE:'Q4')
                      HSAHTPF;
                      Dow Not %Eof(HSAHTPF);
                         If AHT470 <> *Blanks;

                         ReadE
                         (PKZ:G71010:G71020:STORNO:G71030:G_BEREICH:G_WETE:

                      EndDo;
                      SetLl
                      (PKZ:G71010:G71020:STORNO:G71030:G_BEREICH:G_WETE:'Q4')

     D Age             S              9  0
     C*****************************************************************
        Monitor;
           If G7324A = '1';
              Age = %Diff(%Date(G71090:*Iso):%Date(G71080:*Iso):*M);
           Else;
              Age = %Diff(%Date(G71090:*Iso):%Date(G7325A:*Eur):*M);
           EndIf;
        On-Error *All;
              Age = 100;
        EndMon;
        If Age > 99;
           KLMTH = 99;
        Else;
           KLMTH = Age;
        EndIf;

     P getDates        B

       dates = *Blanks;
       exec sql
          declare c4 Cursor for select AHK080, AHK620
            from HSAHKPF
            where AHK000 = :G71000 and AHK010 = :G71010 and AHK020 = :G71020
            and AHK030 = ' ' and AHK040 = :G71030 and AHK050 = :G71190;

     D*****************************************************************

     D*****************************************************************
     P getModules      B
     D getModules      PI           130A
     D*---------------------------------------------------------------
     D result          S            130A
     D workOrderFull   S             23A
     D*---------------------------------------------------------------
       getDates();
       workOrderFull = G71000 + '-' + G71030 + '-' + %Subst(G71200:6:4) + '-' +
                       bookDate;
       exec sql
          SELECT LISTAGG(FTM_MT_COD, ', ') into :result
            FROM HSFTMF
            WHERE ftm_wkowo = :workOrderFull;
       If SQLCOD = 0;
          return result;
       Else;
          return *Blanks;

     D*****************************************************************
     P readPositions   B
     D readPositions   PI
     D   dealerId                     3A   value
     D   claimNo                      8A   value
     D*****************************************************************
       Dcl-S x Int(10) Inz(1);

       clear Positions;
       exec sql
                SELECT LISTAGG(DISTINCT DIGITS(AHW075)),
                       LISTAGG(DISTINCT DIGITS(AHW075))
                       WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY AHW075) AS AHW075
                       into :Positions.List
                       FROM (
                             SELECT AHW000, AHW010, AHW020, AHW075 FROM HSAHWPF
                                    UNION
                             SELECT AHP000 AS AHW000, AHP010 AS AHW010,
                                    AHP020 AS AHW020, AHP075 AS AHW075
                             FROM HSAHPPF
                       ) AS AHW
                       JOIN HSG71PF
                            ON AHW000 = G71000 AND AHW010 = G71010 AND
                               AHW020 = G71020
                       WHERE G71000 = :dealerId AND G71050  = :claimNo AND
                             AHW075 > 0;
       Positions = %ScanRpl(' ' : '0' : Positions);
